title: Hollow Engine
description: Powerful content creation framework for modpacks maps and servers. Features Kotlin & Katari scripting, in-game scripting IDE, advanced NPCs, dialogues, animations, and cutscenes all in one.
body:
![HollowEngine Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/0mods/HollowEngineDocumentation/refs/heads/master/static/img/headers/welcome2.webp)

# HollowEngine
> **HollowEngine** is a powerful Minecraft modding tool designed to simplify custom game mechanics, event scripting, and storytelling. It provides developers and modpack creators with a easiest and powerful framework to build interactive experiences without the need to compile complex Java code.

## What can it do?

| Key Features: |
|---------------------|
| **Event-Driven Scripting**: Easily trigger actions based on player behavior, world events, or custom conditions.  |
| **Story & Quest Tools**: Built-in systems for creating interactive dialogues, cutscenes, and branching questlines. |
| **Performance-First**: Lightweight execution engine that handles complex logic with minimal impact on TPS. |
| **Developer Friendly**: Clear syntax, helpful logging in IDE, and easy integration with existing modpacks. |

## Documentation & Wiki
> **Looking for script examples, API references, or tutorials?** Everything you need to build with HollowEngine is available on our official platform.

**Visit our documentation hub** for complete guides on triggers, actions, and event scripting:

*Read the Documentation at [0mods.team](https://0mods.team/docs/hollowengine)*

## License & Permissions
**Can I use this in my modpack?**
> Yes! Feel free to include HollowEngine in any public or private modpack.

**Source Code**: Distributed under the **Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International** License. 
> Contributions are welcome on GitHub!
